For the Gluten-Free Tapas Tour, since it's specifically designed to be gluten-free (addressing her dietary needs) and is an evening activity combining food and culture, I'll use the Tapas Bar rating of 7 as the closest match, though the gluten-free specialization would likely make it more suitable than a regular tapas bar.

For 'Local markets/cafés meals', this aligns with 'Night Market Visit' which has a rating of 8, as it involves exploring local food options.
